summary: Dominion OS is public-demo ready and controlled prospect-share ready. Full commercial launch remains blocked until direct MP4 or intentionally non-MP4 recording language, commerce, customer portal, production observability, autonomous remediation, and client-safe payment/provisioning receipts exist.

currentEvidence: Cloud Run demo, health, and status routes are the required public runtime targets.
Health/status routes provide liveness proof for the demo sandbox.
Direct MP4 remains null in demo/assets/demo-manifest.json, so public copy must not imply an actual direct MP4 until a verified asset exists.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Public /demo, /health, and /status probes pass, and the live demo copy contains no stale all-green, direct-MP4-complete, or full-commercial-green claims.

currentEvidence: squarespace/demo-1-final.html is the source bridge package.
DEMO_1_POST_PUBLISH_VERIFICATION.md defines the live-DOM pass criteria.
statusMatrix.greenGate: The deployed Squarespace /demo-1 DOM returns HTTP 200 and contains all required strings, CTAs, referrer/link hardening, manifest allowlist, and approved visual styling.

currentEvidence: demo-manifest.json, sample-data.json, demo-download-package.json, release-receipts.json, commercial-launch-readiness.json, poster, and watchlist artifacts are intended source-served public assets.
direct MP4 remains null by design until a real file is generated and publicly verified.
statusMatrix.greenGate: All source-served public assets return HTTP 200 with expected content types from the watchlist daemon, and no manifest URL points at a missing file.

currentEvidence: Public demo assets assert no secrets, customer data, payment data, or private services.
Public bridge is intended to expose only approved public demo-build artifacts.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Secret scanning, dependency scanning, tenant-isolation proof, and public-boundary review receipts exist for the public release path.

currentEvidence: PR #127 added public watchlist and post-publish verification scaffolding.
Existing checks prove the verification layer, not full commercial production qualification.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Current CI, link checks, asset checks, public-boundary checks, and e2e bridge checks pass on the release candidate.

currentEvidence: Cloud Run root/demo/health/status routes are required public routes in the delivery contract.
release-receipts.json records those routes as operator-verified demo-sandbox receipts.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Hourly daemon probes confirm current route health and publish durable receipts.

currentEvidence: No public proof of checkout, customer portal, subscription, billing, tenant provisioning, or entitlement lifecycle is present in demo-build.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Live or deliberately invoice-only commercial intake is documented with payment/procurement, onboarding, entitlement, support, refund, and privacy receipts.

currentEvidence: No durable public proof of uptime checks, alert routing, SLOs, incident receipts, traces, or metrics retention is present in demo-build.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Uptime, alerting, log-sampling, incident response, and rollback receipts are generated and stored without exposing secrets.

currentEvidence: Delivery contract names phi-ops as the operational daemon/evidence layer.
Native GCP self-healing is explicitly not allowed as a claim without separate proof.
statusMatrix.greenGate: Watcher ingestion, autonomous remediation, rollback/recovery, and self-healing receipts exist and can be audited.

allowedNow: Dominion OS has a live public Google Cloud demo surface with public demo, health, and status routes, a canonical /demo-1 bridge package, source-served public demo assets, sample data, release receipts, and a watchlist verification layer.

requiredReceiptsForFullCommercialGreen: hourly probe output for /demo-1, Cloud Run routes, and raw assets
autonomous remediation/self-healing receipt if that claim is made
